sections.title: Psalm 119:137, 124
sections.author: Steve Angrisano, Sarah Hart, and Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: You are just, O Lord, and your judgment is right; treat your servant in accord with your merciful love.

sections.title: Psalm 90:3-4, 5-6, 12-13, 14-17
sections.author: Chris Muglia
sections.snippet: In every age, O Lord, you have been our refuge.

sections.author: Steve Angrisano
sections.snippet: Let your face shine upon your servant; and teach me your laws.
sections.title: Psalm 119:135
In Every Age
sections.author: Janèt Sullivan Whitaker
sections.snippet: Long before the mountains came to be and the land and sea and stars of the night; through the endless seasons of all time, you have always been, you will always be.

sections.author: Steve Angrisano, Sarah Hart, and Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Like the deer that yearns for running streams, so my soul is yearning for you, my God; my soul is thirsting for God, the living God.
sections.title: Psalm 42 (41): 2-3
On Eagle’s Wings
sections.author: Michael Joncas
sections.snippet: You who dwell in the shelter of the Lord, who abide in his shadow for life, say to the Lord: "My refuge, my rock in whom I trust!"

sections.title: As the Deer Longs
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: As the deer longs for running streams, so I long, so I long, so I long for you.

sections.title: For Your Glory
sections.author: Matt Maher
sections.snippet: There is a time to live; There is a time to die; There is a time to laugh; There is a time to cry; There is a time to dance; A time for joy's embrace; And in all seasons, God we humbly seek Your face.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
